Notice Of Motion To File Under Seal
Off Calendar Dec-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Daniel Sterrett, Esq. (415.829.4485; Sterrett@sterrettlawfirm.com) of Sterrett Law for Plaintiff.
Sabrina Berdux, Esq. (415.554.3929; Sabrina.M.Berdux@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Defendant.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To File Under Seal:
CCSF's motion to seal is granted. There is good cause to seal the adduced exhibits under Cal. R. Ct. 2.550. CCSF shall prepare an order that sets forth the findings of Cal. R. Ct. 2.550(d) and states that Ex. A to the Montiel Decl., Ex. A to the Curiel Decl., and Ex. B to the Berdux Decl. are sealed as requested.

Order is signed.
